mapper.select: SELECT t.id, t.title, t.cover, t.description, t.price, t.sub_count AS subCount, t.level, t.chapter_count AS chapterCount, ROUND( (0.70 * IFNULL(t.sub_raw / NULLIF(m.max_sub_raw, 0), 0) + 0.20 * (0.80 * IFNULL(t.chapter_raw / NULLIF(m.max_chapter_raw, 0), 0) + 0.20 * IFNULL(t.free_chapter_raw / NULLIF(m.max_free_chapter_raw, 0), 0)) + 0.10 * t.level_score) * t.time_decay, 4 ) AS hotScore FROM ( SELECT b.id, b.title, b.cover, b.description, b.price, b.sub_count, b.level, b.create_time, IFNULL(cs.chapter_count, 0) AS chapter_count, LN(1 + IFNULL(b.sub_count, 0)) AS sub_raw, LN(1 + IFNULL(cs.chapter_count, 0)) AS chapter_raw, LN(1 + IFNULL(cs.free_chapter_count, 0)) AS free_chapter_raw, CASE WHEN b.level IS NULL THEN 0 WHEN CAST(b.level AS UNSIGNED) >= 2 THEN 1 ELSE CAST(b.level AS UNSIGNED) / 2 END AS level_score, CASE WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(DAY, b.create_time, NOW()) <= 30 THEN 1.20 WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(DAY, b.create_time, NOW()) <= 90 THEN 1.00 WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(DAY, b.create_time, NOW()) <= 180 THEN 0.85 WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(DAY, b.create_time, NOW()) <= 365 THEN 0.70 ELSE 0.55 END AS time_decay FROM osh_book b LEFT JOIN ( SELECT book_id, COUNT(*) AS chapter_count, SUM(CASE WHEN is_free = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS free_chapter_count FROM osh_book_chapter WHERE delete_flag = 0 AND del_flag = '0' GROUP BY book_id ) cs ON cs.book_id = b.id WHERE b.status = '0' AND b.del_flag = '0' AND b.delete_flag = 0 ) t JOIN ( SELECT MAX(LN(1 + IFNULL(b2.sub_count, 0))) AS max_sub_raw, MAX(LN(1 + IFNULL(cs2.chapter_count, 0))) AS max_chapter_raw, MAX(LN(1 + IFNULL(cs2.free_chapter_count, 0))) AS max_free_chapter_raw FROM osh_book b2 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT book_id, COUNT(*) AS chapter_count, SUM(CASE WHEN is_free = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS free_chapter_count FROM osh_book_chapter WHERE delete_flag = 0 AND del_flag = '0' GROUP BY book_id ) cs2 ON cs2.book_id = b2.id WHERE b2.status = '0' AND b2.del_flag = '0' AND b2.delete_flag = 0 ) m ON 1 = 1 ORDER BY hotScore DESC, t.create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
